regime_badge_text: POSITIVE Gamma - Contained with Mean Reversion
regime_paragraph_1: The net gamma of +12B confirms a positive gamma regime, dominated by long gamma dealer positioning. This framework supports dampened volatility and decelerated moves, with expected mean reversion inside the active control zone between 7020 and 7060. Dealers' long gamma exposure will absorb directional moves in this range, fostering premium decay and reducing acceleration in price action.
regime_paragraph_2: The nearest active control zone cluster around 7020-7060 is the key structural reference, with spot inside it at 7040.75. This suggests the market is contained and encouraged to revert around this zone rather than engage the more distant call wall at 7100. The latter acts as a structural cap and long gamma flip level but remains out of immediate influence. Acceptance inside the control zone supports continued measured oscillation with limited trend risk.
regime_paragraph_3: Charm effects late in the day favor drift and containment unless the critical charm pin at 7100 is approached, which is not the case currently. Vanna relevance is low given subdued volatility and the proximity to the control zone, so it plays a negligible role here. The regime remains intact unless spot decisively breaches below 6750, which would invalidate the positive gamma case and invite negative gamma risk.
primary_setup_title: Mean Reversion Iron Condor in the Active Control Zone
primary_setup_body: With spot firmly inside 7020-7060 and positive gamma well established, favor iron condor structures that capture premium decay through measured range-bound movement. The 7020 support and 7060 resistance delimit the corridor for consolidation, enabling profit from contained drift and suppressed volatility. Invalidating below 6750 negates this setup.
secondary_setup_title: Bull Call Spread Targeting Structural Cap
secondary_setup_body: Consider call debit spreads between current spot and the call wall at 7100 for directional exposure with defined risk. As 7100 acts as a gamma flip and charm pin level, acceptance above this point opens the door for upside acceleration. Use 7100 as the key invalidation level against this setup.
avoid_title: Avoid Directional Debit Spreads Within Control Zone
avoid_body: Due to strong containment and dealer long gamma absorption inside 7020-7060, directional debit spreads here risk adverse theta drag and limited directional follow-through. Favor range structures over outright directional exposure until clear invalidation occurs.
wildcard_title: Monitor Spot Reaction Near 7100 Charm Pin
wildcard_body: Late-day charm effects can reinforce pinning if spot approaches 7100, a critical charm pin and gamma transition level. Maintaining spot below 7100 supports containment; acceptance above may trigger volatility ramp and regime shift. Vanna remains secondary in this scenario.

options_trade_ideas.name: 7020-7060 Iron Condor
options_trade_ideas.thesis: Capture premium decay within the active control zone characterized by long gamma and dampened volatility.
options_trade_ideas.structure: Sell OTM puts around 7020 and calls around 7060; buy lower strike put and higher strike call for wing protection.
options_trade_ideas.when_valid: Spot remains between 7020 and 7060; positive net gamma regime holds.
options_trade_ideas.risk_note: Invalidation occurs if spot closes below 6750 or above 7100, increasing volatility and directional risk.

options_trade_ideas.name: 7050-7100 Bull Call Spread
options_trade_ideas.thesis: Directional upside exposure toward the gamma flip and charm pin at 7100, anticipating potential acceptance above the call wall.
options_trade_ideas.structure: Buy 7050 call, sell 7100 call debit spread.
options_trade_ideas.when_valid: Spot moves above current range and shows acceptance near 7100.
options_trade_ideas.risk_note: Failure to sustain above 7100 may result in premium decaying back inside control zone.

timing_notes.window: Charm Window Opens to Close Decay
timing_notes.note: Charm influence grows late day, reinforcing containment unless spot nears the 7100 charm pin where pinning may occur.
Early recognition of spot inside control zone allows efficient entry into iron condor strategies before volatility compresses.
Watch for potential regime shifts as liquidity thins and gamma exposure dynamics rapidly evolve.

summary_cards.bias: Range-bound with mean reversion inside 7020-7060 control zone
summary_cards.pin_zone: No immediate pin; charm pin at 7100 remains out of reach
summary_cards.bull_trigger: Acceptance and sustained move above 7100 opens upside acceleration
summary_cards.bear_trigger: Failure to hold 6750 invalidates positive gamma regime and increases directional risk
summary_cards.wildcard: Watch spot near 7100 for late-day charm-induced pinning or breakout
